---
date: "2021-01-01"
title: "Review Biogeography and Global Ecology"
---

```{r code-brewing-opts, echo=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  comment = "R>", 
  warning = FALSE, 
  message = FALSE,
  fig.width = 4.5,
  fig.height = 2.625,
  out.width = "75%",
  fig.asp = NULL, # control via width/height
  dpi = 300
)

ggplot2::theme_set(
  ggplot2::theme_minimal(base_size = 8)
)
ggplot2::theme_set(
  ggplot2::theme_bw(base_size = 8)
)
```

BCB743 assumes that you still remember the biodiversity and macroecology material from BDC334. Use the links below as a refresher before you start the quantitative parts of this module.

::: callout-tip
## BDC334 Material for Review in Week 1

-   [1. Overview of Ecosystems](../BDC334/Lec-02-ecosystems.qmd)
-   [2. Ecological Gradients](../BDC334/Lec-03-gradients.qmd)
-   [3. Biodiversity Concepts](../BDC334/Lec-04-biodiversity.qmd)
-   [4. Unified Ecology](../BDC334/Lec-06-unified-ecology.qmd)
-   [5. Environmental Distance](../BDC334/Lab-02b-env_dist.qmd)
-   [6. Quantifying Biodiversity](../BDC334/Lab-03-biodiversity.qmd)
-   [7. Species Distribution Patterns](../BDC334/Lab-04-biodiversity.qmd)
:::
